name: m3
description: Local-first persistent memory for Antigravity — 101 MCP tools, hybrid search (FTS5 + vector + MMR), bitemporal contradictions, GDPR primitives, chatlog auto-capture, multi-agent handoffs.

endpoint.title: LLM endpoint
endpoint.description: OpenAI-compatible endpoint for embeddings + enrichment. Leave empty to probe LM Studio :1234 and Ollama :11434.

capture_mode.title: Chatlog capture mode
capture_mode.description: Which hooks fire chatlog ingest. One of: both | stop | precompact | none. 'both' = Stop + PreCompact (recommended). Validated by mcp-memory at runtime; invalid values fall back to 'both'.

embed_fallback_url.title: Embedder fallback URL (tier-2)
embed_fallback_url.description: Always-on HTTP embedder URL — the m3-embed-server CPU service. Default :8082.

embed_gguf.title: In-proc embedder GGUF path (tier-1)
embed_gguf.description: Absolute path to a BGE-M3 GGUF file. Optional — if empty, all embeds go through tier-2 HTTP.
